description_long: This warehouse consists of two adjacent rectangular structures with pale yellow walls and large, segmented gray roofs. The buildings are set on a concrete slab, surrounded by orange and white safety barrels and several gray cubic containers. The front and rear facades each feature a large roll-up door, flanked by small circular lights or fixtures, and a striped yellow-and-black caution area directly in front of the entrance. The roof is pitched with a series of repeating ridges, suggesting a metal or reinforced material, and lacks windows or decorative elements. The exterior is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality and safety. The overall design is industrial, suitable for storage or logistics operations in an urban environment.
description: A pair of pale yellow, industrial warehouse buildings with pitched gray roofs, roll-up doors, and safety barrels on a concrete base. The design is utilitarian and focused on storage and logistics.
description_view_0: Front view showing two roll-up doors, four gray cubic containers, and a striped caution area with safety barrels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the warehouse, the pitched roof, and multiple safety barrels along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with roll-up doors, gray containers, and safety barrels visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's length, pitched roof, and arrangement of safety barrels.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features pale yellow walls with large roll-up metal doors, flanked by circular light fixtures and a prominent yellow-and-black caution strip at the entrance. The exterior is plain, with no windows or decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and safety.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is pitched with a series of repeating ridges, constructed from corrugated metal panels, and lacks skylights or visible HVAC units.
